titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Collection of Broadsides by Artists and Presses
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Arts of the Book Staff

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 7877559.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday May 21, 2021 at 23:00

did.unittitle: Collection of Broadsides by Artists and Presses
did.abstract: The materials document the production of broadsides by both individual artists and fine presses.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Acquired by both gift and purchase.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Collection of Broadsides by Artists and Presses, Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials document the production of broadsides by both individual artists and fine presses from the early to mid-20th century to the present day.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Holdings are arranged alphabetically by either artist or press name.

did.unittitle: Centro de Estudios de Historia de Mexico, Condumex

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Risseeuw is the proprietor of Cabbagehead Press and director of Arizona State University's Pyracantha Press.
